summary: Completed comprehensive testing of POPP Pumps consultation page replacement - backend 100% success, frontend 92% success with minor UI interaction issues

minor_issues.issue: Click interception by overlay preventing form submission via UI
Shows 9 audience cards instead of expected 8 in AUDIENCE array

passed_tests: Backend consultation API endpoint (100% - 37/37 tests passed including new /api/consultations)
Navigation header shows 'Consultation' instead of 'Tank Sizing'
Consultation page loads correctly at /consultation route
Hero section with 'Professional Pump & System Consultation' headline and 2 CTAs
Authority section shows 'Technical Support You Can Rely On' with 6-item checklist
Consultation categories display 5 blocks with 'Request Technical Advice' CTAs
Form has 3 numbered sections (Contact, Project Info, Project Details)
Form dropdowns open and show options (Application Type, Installation Type, Power Supply, Water Source, Timeline)
Form input fields accept text input correctly
Closing CTA shows 'Request Consultation Now' button
Footer Quick Links shows 'System Consultation' instead of 'Tank Sizing Tool'
Homepage tools section shows System Consultation card
Backend POST /api/consultations endpoint verified via direct API test
Old /tank-sizing route still works (backward compatibility maintained)
No 'Tank Sizing' text visible in navigation
All 8 page sections present (Hero, Authority, Audience, Categories, Form, Process, FAQ, CTA)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix form submit button click interception issue (overlay preventing clicks) and verify audience section count (shows 9 instead of 8 items)
